ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL MEDIATION AND ARBITRATION AND STAY THE ACTION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT TIMOTHY CARAHER AND JENNIFER NORMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO PARAGRAPHS 12.6 AND 12.7 OF THE CC&RS. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE AN OPPOSITION. THE MATTER IS STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF THE MEDIATION AND ARBITRATION. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2507.50 PLUS APPLICABLE COSTS. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David M. Perl (415-984-8538) of Morris Polich & Purdy for Defendant/Moving party TIMOTHY CARAHER and JENNIFER NORMAN.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TIMOTHY CARAHER and JENNIFER NORMAN's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is GRANTED pursuant to Paragraphs 12.6 and 12.7 of the CC&Rs. Plaintiff did not file an opposition. The matter is stayed pending the outcome of the mediation and arbitration. Defendants' request for attorney fees is GRANTED in the amount of $2507.50 plus applicable costs. Order is signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Petition And Motion To Compel Arbitration, Dismissal And For Attorneys Fees, Or In The Alternative A Stay
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHN CONOMOS' Motion To Compel Arbitration, Dismissal And For Attorneys Fees, Or In The Alternative A Stay is GRANTED. Arbitration is mandatory pursuant to Paragraph 12.7 of the CC&Rs. Plaintiff does not oppose the arbitration. Defendant's request for dismissal is granted as to Plaintiff's second cause of action. Defendant's request for attorney fees is granted subject to a memorandum for costs regarding the amount. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
